theoremName: exact Mellin convolution boundary identity for finite Xi atoms
identity: X_i(z)=B_i(s,z)+1/2 Psi(s) exp(i scale z s) int_0^inf V_i(s,u) exp(i scale z u)du
conclusion: The exact atom transport is not a constant 6x6 mixing matrix. It is diagonal in the Volterra tail after multiplying by Psi(s), plus an s-dependent incomplete-gamma boundary prefix.
nextProofTarget: Build the Hardy-to-Volterra transmutation with this moving boundary prefix: represent or cancel B_i(s,z) by endpoint/trace terms, then use the diagonal Volterra tail identity for the remaining tail.
